title: Tinyproxy Configuration Structure
description: Structural documentation for Tinyproxy HTTP proxy daemon configuration

fields.name: allow
fields.description: Allowed client IP addresses or CIDR ranges

fields.name: deny
fields.description: Denied client IP addresses or CIDR ranges

fields.name: connectPort
fields.description: Allowed ports for HTTPS CONNECT tunneling

fields.name: logLevel
fields.description: Logging level: Critical, Error, Warning, Notice, Connect, Info

fields.name: reverseOnly
fields.description: Restrict to reverse proxy mode only
